transcript.clean_text: foreign every day live and On Demand on gcn Plus the eight stage almost at the end of the first block of racing the last Road stage before a final time trial on day nine ahead of the first rest day Andreas leknerson still in the pink jersey but could Remco IV Nepal take it back from him on the day before he was to race against the clock there'd be no Felipe Organa out with covid last phone number to cut the second on starter of the day as the rest warmed up on the rollers for an expected big start up the hill 10 kilometers of unclassified climbing to begin today's stage stage eight a three-star stage starting in Tierney heading to fosombrone taking on the mighty Mori Market Jani the wall stage so often seen in tirena adriatico in the market in fact this particular finish had been in tiren adriatico Alexander winning on a dramatic day four years previous to this appearance in the Jilla d'Italia 207 kilometers a long day and it was a frantic start 80 kilometers roughly it took for a breakaway to go four Riders getting up the road a fifth joining in and after the intermediate Sprint plenty more Riders would come across eight in fact that intermediate Sprint allowing Jonathan Milan just to extend his lead in the malachik lamina only by a point or two but hard work for everybody as the second part of the Breakaway started to make contact with the first there'd be one man to add to the list of the 13 eventually up the race Oscar rizovic making a huge effort joining Ben Healy and Company up the road the Italian Champion was there and behind DSM were confident of holding on to the malayaluza they were trying anyway they'd calm things down and the brick would be allowed to take the stage Ben Healy though with 50 kilometers to go attacking and leaving the rest of the Breakaway behind the first of two climbs up the salitare capuchini a rare occasion in Italy where a cappuccino is allowed after 11AM there were mechanical problems for squeege fighting behind at least a falling out anyway between Matia bais and philippozana in all reality they wouldn't see Ben Healy again on Grant to a debut he'd be riding away to the victory but behind in the general classification group things were also Brewing looking good other teams interested in trying to put renko even a pool under pressure and after hilly crested the final climb with more than two minutes of a gap he'd be riding away to a stage when when Primo's roglich did indeed take off at attack Eve Nepal starting to look like he was fading Thomas and gang and Hart fighting hard to stay on the wheel of Primos roglich over the top and seconds will be brought back on even a pool at the end of the day Ben Healy was having a party the second youngest Grand Tour stage winner ever from Ireland Heely just behind Sean Kelly and you are recycling star born and Ben Healy having the spring of his life EF education easy posts winning agility Talia stage for the tenth time in their history a new name doing it strong rides two from Derek G felipozana and Warren bargill they'd complete the top four all the way behind roglitch was riding strongly in your grenadier's pairing of gagan Hart and Thomas also grand tour winners just like raw glitch would be out there trying to just increase the Gap and it'll be a 14 second Gap to evening Paul and Company as they came over the line and fighting behind Andreas lechnerson just about staying in the mayaroza left to count the cost of a few seconds gone then Healy celebrating away another step up from him as he hit the big time Elite beating G by one minute and 49 the biggest winning margin on a judo stage for five years Andreas leknerson making it five days in pink but just an eight second lead now over Remco ivnapol in second place roglitch taking those 14 seconds back and moving to 30 behind the Belgian world champion I'll made a fourth Thomas fifth gegenhart place of Caruso and kemna now all in the top ten next up a big test in the time trial favorite once again Remco evening pool but his Rivals will know it's all about limiting the losses on a day after even a pool show that little bit of weakness for the first time 35 kilometers against the clock leaving saviniana so rubikone it's flat it's for the Specialists three time checks along the way finishing inchesina at the Techno gym Village you better watch it and each and every stage every kilometer live then on demand on GCM plus Italia
